title: Learning Path Dashboard for Enhancing skills
description: Developed an education platform using Flask/Python and MySQL that personalizes learning paths according to each user. Implemented automated tools including BibTeX-to-Excel conversion (for tutors) and real-time progress tracking, while creating Interactive data visualizations to enhance learning analytics and student engagement.

title: STATTS: Smart Doorbell
description: Developed a smart surveillance system with YOLOv8 motion detection (90%+ accuracy), FastAPI backend, and MongoDB Atlas - delivering secure, scalable monitoring through encrypted logging in a software-only architecture.

title: SocialSage
description: Designed and implemented React interfaces for an AI-powered analytics dashboard, developing interactive network visualizations with real-time metrics dashboards using Chart.js, and a responsive Gemini(API) chatbot UI.
